{{Quote|These are allies of our enemy, bringing gifts and swearing allegiance to Coruscant.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]]|<ref name="Darksaber" />}}
'''Porus Vida''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] and famous for its beauty and its culture. Despite its reputation as a peaceful world of [[Museum/Legends|museums]], Porus Vida saw conflict throughout its history, including several sieges during the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], and was [[Attack on Porus Vida|devastated]] by the [[United Warlord Fleets]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

==History==
{{Quote|They chose the wrong side in this galactic conflict, and now they will pay for it.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]]|<ref name="Darksaber" />}}
Populated by [[Human/Legends|Humans]],<ref name="Tinker" /> Porus Vida was a world with beautiful [[Museum/Legends|museums]] of its culture and manicured gardens.<ref name="Darksaber" /> Porus Vida joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Indecta Era]]. During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it was located in the [[Exploitation Region]]. The planet was [[First Siege of Porus Vida|besieged]] during the [[First Alsakan Conflict]] and [[Second Siege of Porus Vida|again]] during the [[Second Alsakan Conflict]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

Around the era of the [[Sith Wars/Legends|Sith Wars]] between the Republic and various [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] factions, Porus Vida was [[Subjugation of Porus Vida|subjugated]] by a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] hired by the nearby world of [[Norulac]]. Led by the psychotic mass-murderer [[Lunatta]], the mercenaries successfully conquered the peaceful world, and Lunatta was permitted to loot an [[Porus Vida art museum|art museum]] on Porus Vida as her payment.<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

Porus Vida eventually affiliated with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and it was one of the first [[Planet/Legends|planets]] attacked by the [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] forces after the [[Imperial Reunification]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] of the [[Crimson Command]] [[Attack on Porus Vida|devastated]] the world under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]].<ref name="Darksaber" />

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
